site.title: Grendel sine Shiny-apper
site.description: Et kuratert utvalg av Grendel sine Shiny-apper, tester og verktøy. En pen startside med de mest brukte sidene og noen faglige favoritter.

hero.title: Grendel sine Shiny-apper
hero.lead: Et kuratert utvalg av verktøy, tester og faglige sider. Noen er nyttige, noen er litt særere, og flere har faktisk folk vært inne på.

main_cards.title: Dette er ikke en ADHD-test
main_cards.description: En kort selvrapportert test av fravær av oppmerksomhets- og reguleringsvansker. Ikke diagnostikk.

main_cards.title: Yrkestilpasningskalkulator
main_cards.description: Ser på Big Five-profiler og foreslår yrker som kan passe bedre enn folk flest tror.

main_cards.title: Fra ICD-10-typer til ICD-11-trekk
main_cards.description: Et pedagogisk overgangsverktøy for å forstå hvordan gamle PF-typer kan ligne trekkprofiler.

main_cards.title: WISC-kalkulatoren
main_cards.description: Kalkulator for prosentil, standardavvik og IQ-skårer i WPPSI, WISC og WAIS.

main_cards.title: Søknadsbrev med faktisk innhold
main_cards.description: En modulær wizard som hjelper deg å skrive søknadsbrev med konkret innhold, ikke bare floskler.

main_cards.title: Nyttekalkulator
main_cards.description: Beregner nytte av seleksjonsmetoder i rekruttering og gjør formelen lettere å forstå.

main_cards.title: Autisme-testen
main_cards.description: En kort selvrapportert test for trekk og erfaringer som kan være relevante. Ikke diagnostikk.

secondary_cards.title: shinyseo
secondary_cards.description: En liten R-pakke for SEO-arbeid, mest for spesielt interesserte. Lenken går til CRAN.

secondary_cards.title: Matgeek
secondary_cards.description: En liten Shiny-app som gjør enkle, nyttige fysikkberegninger for kjøkkenbruk.

secondary_cards.title: Klimaskepsis
secondary_cards.description: Viser utviklingen i arktisk havis ved årlig minimum, med glatting og forklaringer.

secondary_cards.title: Barnefilmer i Verdal og Steinkjer
secondary_cards.description: Oppdatert oversikt over barne- og ungdomsfilmer med dato, klokkeslett, sal og korte omtaler.

secondary_cards.title: Kognitiv sporing
secondary_cards.description: Daglig egenmonitorering av kognitiv endring over tid. Ikke mot en norm, men mot deg selv.

notes_cards.title: Legacy inngang til ADHD-testen
notes_cards.description: En eldre vei inn til samme tema, som fortsatt har sin egen lille trafikkstrøm.

notes_cards.title: WISC-testing
notes_cards.description: Mer en faglig forklaringsside enn en full app, men tydelig interessant for et nisjepublikum.

site.title: Grendel's Shiny apps
site.description: A curated selection of Grendel's Shiny apps, tests and tools, with the most useful pages and a few specialist favourites.

hero.title: Grendel's Shiny apps
hero.lead: A curated collection of tools, tests and specialist pages. Some are useful, some are a little more peculiar, and several are visited by actual people.

main_cards.title: This is not an ADHD test
main_cards.description: A brief self-report measure of the absence of attention and regulation difficulties. Not a diagnostic tool.

main_cards.title: Career fit calculator
main_cards.description: Uses Big Five profiles to suggest occupations that may suit you better than most people would expect.

main_cards.title: From ICD-10 types to ICD-11 traits
main_cards.description: An educational transition tool for understanding how the old personality disorder types may resemble trait profiles.

main_cards.title: WISC calculator
main_cards.description: A calculator for percentiles, standard deviations and IQ scores in WPPSI, WISC and WAIS.

main_cards.title: Cover letters with actual content
main_cards.description: A modular wizard that helps you write a concrete cover letter instead of assembling empty phrases.

main_cards.title: Utility calculator
main_cards.description: Calculates the utility of selection methods in recruitment and makes the underlying formula easier to understand.

main_cards.title: Autism questionnaire
main_cards.description: A brief self-report measure of traits and experiences that may be relevant. Not a diagnostic tool.

secondary_cards.title: shinyseo
secondary_cards.description: A small R package for SEO work, mainly for those with a particular interest. The link goes to CRAN.

secondary_cards.title: Kitchen geek
secondary_cards.description: A small Shiny app for simple, useful physics calculations in the kitchen.

secondary_cards.title: Climate scepticism
secondary_cards.description: Shows the development of Arctic sea ice at its annual minimum, with smoothing and explanations.

secondary_cards.title: Children's films in Verdal and Steinkjer
secondary_cards.description: An up-to-date overview of films for children and young people, including dates, times, screens and short descriptions.

secondary_cards.title: Cognitive tracking
secondary_cards.description: Daily self-monitoring of cognitive change over time, measured against yourself rather than a norm.

notes_cards.title: Legacy route to the ADHD questionnaire
notes_cards.description: An older route into the same topic that still attracts its own small stream of traffic.

notes_cards.title: WISC testing
notes_cards.description: More of a specialist explainer than a full app, but clearly useful to a niche audience.
